calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (116 Berry St., Hayward, Ca 94544)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Frost for and with Felix Sung.

Mr. Frost stated that only 50% of the property is being sold, that there is no necessity for bond because the Estate will not receive any cash and that the other 50% of the property is owned by Ms. Sung in a Trust. Mr. Frost also stated that the Buyers are in contract with the Trust to buy the other 50% of the property and will be buying 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $250,000.00 for 50% of the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 24, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No further bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Frost for Felix Sung (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is no one here to object to the petition. Mr. Frost stated that he did not get any objection. The Court stated that the stepson has Power of Attorneys to nominate and that the Petition for Letters of Administration is granted (order for the same signed in open court). Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)
